reviews.review_title: Can't make it work on Quest 3
reviews.review_description: I want to like it, but I can't even make the stone move. It just keeps repeating that I'm in launch my body mode, but even hitting all the buttons while aiming at the stone, nothing makes the stone move.

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving it a try and a review! Getting the hang of it is tricky. The trick is to hold either the trigger or grip down on the controller. This will  make the background turn green, letting you know you're in "launch your body mode". Release the trigger in the middle of doing a headbang maneuver with your head. How fast your head is moving towards the broom when you release the trigger determines your launch velocity. After that release, looking down should make it clear how fast you're moving. Grip the trigger and immediately release the trigger to give the stone your velocity. When you're going fast enough the background will not turn green. The same trigger is first used to launch, then again for the stone. Once you get the hang of that, the second press of the trigger can be held to spin the stone before releasing.
